# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: ["**"]
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:

concurrency:
  group: ci-${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

env:
  NODE_VERSION: "20"
  PYTHON_VERSION: "3.11"
  PIP_CACHE_DIR: ~/.cache/pip
  ENVIRONMENT: ${{ vars.ENVIRONMENT || 'dev' }}

jobs:
  build-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        node: ["20"]
        python: ["3.11"]

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node }}
          cache: "npm"
          cache-dependency-path: |
            package-lock.json
            **/package-lock.json
            npm-shrinkwrap.json
            **/npm-shrinkwrap.json

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ matrix.python }}

      - name: Detect environment (optional)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if [[ -f .github/environment ]]; then
            echo "ENVIRONMENT=$(cat .github/environment | tr -d '[:space:]')" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"
          fi

      - name: Cache node_modules
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            **/node_modules
          key: >-
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ matrix.node }}-env-${{ env.ENVIRONMENT }}-node_modules-
            ${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json', '**/package-lock.json', 'npm-shrinkwrap.json', '**/npm-shrinkwrap.json', '.npmrc', '**/.npmrc') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ matrix.node }}-env-${{ env.ENVIRONMENT }}-node_modules-
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ matrix.node }}-node_modules-

      - name: Cache pip packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ${{ env.PIP_CACHE_DIR }}
            .venv
          key: >-
            ${{ runner.os }}-python-${{ matrix.python }}-env-${{ env.ENVIRONMENT }}-pip-
            ${{ hashFiles('requirements.txt', 'requirements/*.txt', 'pyproject.toml', 'poetry.lock', 'Pipfile.lock', 'setup.cfg', 'setup.py', 'tox.ini', '.python-version', '.pip/pip.conf', 'pip.conf') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-python-${{ matrix.python }}-env-${{ env.ENVIRONMENT }}-pip-
            ${{ runner.os }}-python-${{ matrix.python }}-pip-

      - name: Cache build outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            dist
            build
            out
            .next/cache
            .turbo
            .cache
            .parcel-cache
            coverage
            .pytest_cache
            .mypy_cache
            .ruff_cache
          key: >-
            ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ matrix.node }}-${{ matrix.python }}-env-${{ env.ENVIRONMENT }}-
            ${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json', '**/package-lock.json', 'requirements.txt', 'requirements/*.txt', 'pyproject.toml', 'poetry.lock', 'Pipfile.lock', 'tsconfig.json', '**/tsconfig.json', 'vite.config.*', 'webpack.config.*', 'next.config.*', 'turbo.json', '.babelrc*', '**/.babelrc*') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ matrix.node }}-${{ matrix.python }}-env-${{ env.ENVIRONMENT }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-build-

      - name: Cache configuration (environment-specific)
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .npmrc
            **/.npmrc
            .nvmrc
            .node-version
            .yarnrc
            .yarnrc.yml
            .pnp.cjs
            .pnp.loader.mjs
            .env
            .env.*
            config/**
            configs/**
            .config/**
            .github/environment
          key: >-
            ${{ runner.os }}-config-env-${{ env.ENVIRONMENT }}-
            ${{ hashFiles('.npmrc', '**/.npmrc', '.nvmrc', '.node-version', '.yarnrc', '.yarnrc.yml', '.env', '.env.*', 'config/**', 'configs/**', '.config/**', '.github/environment') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-config-env-${{ env.ENVIRONMENT }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-config-

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if [[ -f package-lock.json || -f npm-shrinkwrap.json ]]; then
            npm ci
          elif [[ -f package.json ]]; then
            npm install
          else
            echo "No package.json found; skipping Node install."
          fi

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        shell: bash
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          if [[ -f pyproject.toml && -f poetry.lock ]]; then
            pip install poetry
            poetry config virtualenvs.in-project true
            poetry install --no-interaction
          elif [[ -f requirements.txt ]]; then
            python -m venv .venv
            source .venv/bin/activate
            pip install -r requirements.txt
          else
            echo "No Python dependency file found; skipping Python install."
          fi

      - name: Build (if present)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if [[ -f package.json ]]; then
            npm run build --if-present
          fi

      - name: Test (if present)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if [[ -f package.json ]]; then
            npm test --if-present
          fi
          if [[ -f requirements.txt || -f pyproject.toml ]]; then
            if [[ -d .venv ]]; then
              source .venv/bin/activate
            fi
            python -m pytest -q || true
          fi
